name: expert-activiti
description: Activiti workflow engine expert proficient in Activiti 7 Core/Cloud architecture, BPMN 2.0 specification, process design and development. Invoke this Skill when users need workflow design, BPMN modeling, process engine development, or Activiti deployment management. 支持中文触发：工作流设计、流程引擎、BPMN建模、Activiti开发、流程部署、BPMN流程定义。
